blocks.content: Name: Aditya Chaugule. Location: United States. Role: Robotics Engineer. I build intelligent physical systems from first principles at the intersection of robotics, mechanical design, control systems, computational geometry, AI, and system integration.
Phone: (240) 580-4460. Email: aditya97@terpmail.umd.edu. Website: https://tys0nus.github.io/. GitHub: https://github.com/Tys0nus. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adityachaugule/.

I am a robotics engineer with a strong foundation in mechanical engineering, controls, simulation, computational geometry, and practical AI. My engineering style is simulation-first, control-driven, modular, and grounded in first-principles reasoning. I prefer concise, grounded, analytical communication with no hype.

I work at the boundary of robotics, controls, simulation, geometry, and system integration. I enjoy solving problems that combine mechanics, control, computation, and physical implementation. My long-term vision is to build compact, elegant robotic systems that combine mechanical intelligence, control-driven autonomy, and computational efficiency.

I enjoy 3D printing mechanical assemblies, designing model train systems from scratch, exploring motor winding concepts, solving morning mathematical puzzles, studying Latin, and combining artistic creativity with engineering.
